name: Mobility-Aware Cache Framework for Scalable LLM-Based Human Mobility Simulation

description: arXiv:2602.16727v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Simulating large-scale human mobility is fundamental to understanding population movement patterns and supporting real-world geospatial applications such as urban planning, epidemic response, and transportation analysis. Recent works treat large language models (LLMs) as human agents to simulate realistic mobility behaviors using structured re...
author: Hua Yan, Heng Tan, Yingxue Zhang, Yu Yang
